description_long: This humanoid robot features a metallic, industrial design with a weathered, dark green and gray exterior. Its head is rounded with two prominent circular eye-like features and a subtle mouth slit, giving it a mechanical yet anthropomorphic appearance. The torso is robust and segmented, with visible bolts and panel lines, while the arms and legs are jointed and reinforced with brown, ribbed sections at the elbows and knees. The hands are simple, with three articulated fingers each, and the feet are flat and rectangular, designed for stability. The robot's overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments. The surface finish is matte with signs of wear, indicating frequent use or exposure to harsh conditions.
description: A weathered, metallic humanoid robot with a rounded head, jointed limbs, and a robust, industrial build. Its matte, dark green and gray exterior features visible bolts and ribbed joints.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's symmetrical build, rounded head with two circular eyes, and outstretched arms revealing ribbed elbow joints and three-fingered hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the robot's profile, showing the curvature of the head, segmented torso, and the alignment of the limbs with visible knee and elbow joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, torso, and legs, with panel lines and bolts visible, and the arms extended to the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the robot's flat feet, jointed limbs, and the mechanical structure of the torso and head.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; exterior consists of integrated metallic and plastic panels with ribbed joint coverings.
attribute_facial_features: Face features two large, circular eye-like elements and a subtle mouth slit; no visible nose or expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have three articulated fingers each; limbs appear rigid but jointed for basic movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two circular eye-like sensors on the front of the head.
